Smart Inventory & Sales Management API
>> Automatic Product Registration using Metaclass
>> Field Validation using Descriptors
>> Abstract Product Base Class

Class\IncrementalProject\registry\registry.py:
A central regisrtry that keeps track of all product classes 
_products: is a class level dictionary
register(cls, product_class): adds a new entry to _products
display_registered_products: print the names of all registered product types

Class\IncrementalProject\models\descriptors.py:
__set_name__: called when a class gets created
__get__ : called when we invoke product.name product.price
__set__ : called when we add product.price=50000 product.quantity=20

Class\IncrementalProject\models\metaclass.py:
class ProductMeta: is a metaclass (a class that creates classes)
__new__ : is called every time a new class gets created
After the new_class 

Class\IncrementalProject\models\base_product.py:
Is a ABC which helps in creating details of the product

Class\IncrementalProject\models\product.py:
BaseProduct as the ABC for all products
It uses ProductMeta as its metaclass: Abstract methods
display_details:  @abstractmethod
BaseProduct interface for products to be created.
products gets created it has to implement the ABC & abstractmethod

Class\IncrementalProject\main.py:
>> Importing and class creation process initiation
>> Instantiating products
>> Displaying details of the products
>> Showing the registered product classes
